2606.10713.title: ++nnU-Net: Scaling nnU-Net with Prefix-Based Data Augmentation
2606.10713.paper_summary: The nnU-Net has demonstrated continuous success in medical segmentation tasks, which heavily rely on the availability and diversity of annotated biomedical data. However, assembling medical imaging cohorts remains challenging due to numerous factors such as privacy regulations and annotation costs. As a result, data augmentation plays a crucial role in increasing data availability while maintaining anatomical feasibility. Hence, we propose the ++nnU-Net, a novel data augmentation module based on image registration that operates prior to preprocessing and training take place. Our framework was evaluated across five different 2D datasets. In this workflow, image data go through a two-stage registration process, generating new warped images. The transformations are then applied to the respective segmentation. In addition, the pipeline computes available disk space, generates supplementary binary synthetic masks and generates checkpoints. We demonstrate that the ++nnU-Net outperforms the nnU-Net baseline, yielding improvements in Dice Similarity Coefficient scores. In the most prominent cases, we observe performance gains of approximately 22\%. These findings highlight the effectiveness of registration-based data augmentation, particularly for 2D medical imaging datasets and suggest that the ++nnU-Net provides a practical and scalable approach for enhancing segmentation performance in data-limited settings. The source code for the ++nnU-Net is available at: https://github.com/sofia-adelie/plusplusnnunet.git
2606.10713.paper_summary_zh: nnU-Net 在醫學分割任務中持續展現成功，這些任務在很大程度上依賴於標註生物醫學數據的可用性和多樣性。<lb/>然而，組建醫學影像隊列仍然面臨挑戰，這是由於隱私法規和標註成本等多種因素造成的。<lb/>因此，數據增強在提高數據可用性同時保持解剖學可行性方面扮演著至關重要的角色。<lb/>因此，我們提出了 ++nnU-Net，一個基於影像配準的新型數據增強模組，該模組在預處理和訓練之前運行。<lb/>我們的框架在五個不同的 2D 數據集上進行了評估。<lb/>在這個工作流程中，影像數據經過兩階段的配準過程，生成新的變形影像。<lb/>然後將這些變換應用於相應的分割。<lb/>此外，該流程計算可用的磁碟空間，生成補充的二進制合成掩膜並生成檢查點。<lb/>我們展示了 ++nnU-Net 超越了 nnU-Net 基準，在 Dice 相似度係數分數上取得了改進。<lb/>在最顯著的情況下，我們觀察到性能提升約 22%。<lb/>這些發現突顯了基於配準的數據增強的有效性，特別是對於 2D 醫學影像數據集，並建議 ++nnU-Net 提供了一種實用且可擴展的方法來增強數據有限環境中的分割性能。<lb/>++nnU-Net 的源代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/sofia-adelie/plusplusnnunet.git
2606.10713.author: Ana Sofia Santos et.al.
2606.10713.authors: Ana Sofia Santos, André Ferreira, Gijs Luijten, Naida Solak, Lisle Faray de Paiva, Behrus Hinrichs-Puladi, Jens Kleesiek, Jan Egger, Victor Alves
